# Maine Padel at the Downs

> Maine's first premier padel club, coming to The Downs in Scarborough, Maine.

Maine Padel at the Downs is bringing the world's fastest-growing racket sport to Maine's most exciting new mixed-use community. The club will feature 4 indoor climate-controlled courts and 2 outdoor covered courts, a bar and restaurant, pro shop, and event space.

## About Padel

Padel is a racket sport played in a glass-walled enclosed court roughly one-third the size of a tennis court. It blends the accessibility of tennis with the social energy of squash. Players of all ages and skill levels can pick it up within an hour. Born in Mexico in 1969 and adopted by Spain as a national obsession, padel has spread to over 78 countries with more than 25 million players worldwide.

## Key Facts

- Location: The Downs, Scarborough, Maine 04074
- Courts: 4 indoor + 2 outdoor covered courts
- Amenities: Bar & restaurant, pro shop, locker rooms, event space
- Court rates: 90-minute sessions, $60–$120 per court
- Membership tiers: Explorer ($89/mo), Club ($149/mo), Unlimited ($199/mo)
- Global padel market: $2.8 billion (2026)
- US padel growth: 40% year-over-year
- Players worldwide: 25+ million across 78 countries

## Leadership

- William Graham, Club Director — 20 years in luxury hospitality and sports marketing with international padel experience

## Contact

- Website: https://padelmaine.com

## Priority Access

Visitors can join the Priority Access list at https://padelmaine.com/#priority-access to receive early membership offers, exclusive event invitations, and founding member benefits.
